title: More Music Discs Polymer Patch
description: Patches the More Music Discs mod to work with Polymer, Fully server side!
body:
## Polymer Patch for More Music Discs
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/morediscs-polymer)
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/morediscs-polymer)

This is a simple server side mod that patches More Music Discs to work fully server side!

### Resource pack
A server resource pack is required for this mod to work properly; The recommended way is to use [Polymer's Autohost](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/). 

### Disclaimer
I do not own any assets from the original [More Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-music-discs) mod, and this mod does not redistribute any assets from it.

This means that the original mod is required to run this mod.
